2605.25708.title: CMAP: Cross-Modal Adaptive Prompting for Multi-Domain Task-Incremental Learning
2605.25708.paper_summary: Multi-domain task-incremental learning requires a model to sequentially acquire knowledge across visually diverse domains without forgetting prior tasks, and without access to task identity at inference. Parameter-efficient methods built on frozen vision-language models have made strong progress, yet all existing approaches rely exclusively on visual features for task routing, confidence estimation, and encoder adaptation, leaving CLIP's cross-modal text embedding space entirely unexploited. We address this gap through three contributions. Text-space task routing replaces visual Gaussian matching with cosine similarity to frozen CLIP text prototypes, giving order-independent routing robust to data scarcity at zero parameter cost. Multi-prototype visual-textual confidence replaces single-Gaussian class modeling with K-means visual prototypes and cross-modal alignment scores under task-calibrated thresholds. Symmetric cross-modal gating extends per-layer Gumbel gates to the text encoder conditioned on batch image features, preserving cross-modal alignment on out-of-distribution inputs. On the MTIL benchmark spanning 11 datasets and 1201 classes, our method achieves 74.2% Transfer, 80.5% Average, and 88.7% Last under Order-I, surpassing the prior state of the art by 5.0, 3.7, and 3.0 percentage points with only 2.5M trainable parameters and no external data.
2605.25708.paper_summary_zh: 多領域任務增量學習要求模型能夠在視覺上多樣化的領域中順序獲取知識，而不會忘記先前的任務，並且在推理時無法訪問任務身份。基於凍結的視覺-語言模型的參數高效方法已取得顯著進展，但所有現有方法僅依賴於視覺特徵進行任務路由、信心估計和編碼器適應，完全未利用CLIP的跨模態文本嵌入空間。我們通過三個貢獻來解決這一空白。文本空間任務路由用餘弦相似度替代視覺高斯匹配，對凍結的CLIP文本原型進行路由，實現了在零參數成本下對數據稀缺的魯棒性且無序的路由。多原型視覺-文本信心用K均值視覺原型和基於任務校準閾值的跨模態對齊分數替代單一高斯類建模。對稱跨模態閘將每層的Gumbel閘擴展到基於批次圖像特徵的文本編碼器，保持在分佈外輸入上的跨模態對齊。在涵蓋11個數據集和1201個類別的MTIL基準上，我們的方法在Order-I下達到74.2%的轉移率、80.5%的平均值和88.7%的最後值，超越了先前的最先進技術，分別提高了5.0、3.7和3.0個百分點，並且僅使用了2.5M可訓練參數，且沒有外部數據。
2605.25708.author: Sriram Mandalika et.al.
